message:
test(index): add FSVI binary format integration tests (bd-2i8g)

25 integration tests covering write/read roundtrip (f16+f32), metadata
preservation, error handling, WAL lifecycle, tombstone soft_delete/vacuum,
search correctness, CRC corruption detection, and f16 vs f32 ranking
consistency. All validated via rch with clean clippy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
